label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, so I need to figure out this ethical dilemma. Let me start by understanding the situation. My friend invited me to a birthday party for their cousin, someone I've never met. The friend had a gift for the cousin, but they forgot to pack it. I found the gift in their house. The question is whether I should take the initiative and bring the gift to the party without telling my friend, or inform my friend so they can handle it.
